faqs.question: What are the entrance exam accepted by Nigam Institute of Engineering and Technology?
faqs.answer: Nigam Institute of Engineering and Technology accepts students primarily on an entrance basis. Prospective candidates need to appear for the state-level entrance test; OJEE (Odisha Joint Entrance Examination) to be eligible. However, those with a valid score obtained in any other accepted exams, such as JEE may also be considered. Interested students can contact the institute's admission help desk to know more.

faqs.question: What are the M.Tech courses at Nigam Institute of Engineering and Technology?
faqs.answer: Nigam Institute of Engineering and Technology offers two M.Tech programmes. Students can enrol in either Thermal Engineering or Power Electronics & Drives. The admission criteria is same across both of the programmes. Students seeking to get into the institute need to ensure that they fulifl the eligibility and selection criteria of the programme before applying.

faqs.question: Is M.Tech available at Nigam Institute of Engineering and Technology?
faqs.answer: Yes, Nigam Institute of Engineering and Technology does offer MTech. The course is offered in two specialisations; Thermal Engineering and Power Electronics & Drives. Aspirants must have completed graduation from a relevant field to be eligible for admission into this institute. Additionally, students may need to provide valid scores obtained in state-level entrance test (OJEE). Interested students can know more by visiting the official website of NIET.

placements.overview:
Nigam Institute of Engineering and Technology was established in 2009 and is located in Cuttack, Bhubaneswar. The institute is affiliated with the BPUT Odisha. NIET is recognised by the UGC and approved by the AICTE. The institute comes under the aegis of the Nigamananda Integral Educational Trust. The institute offers UG, PG, and diploma courses across Engineering and Vocational Studies. The flagship course offered at NIET is BTech.

Nigam Institute of Engineering and Technology's popular programme is BTech. The institute offers a four-year, full-time BTech programme. NIET offers a BTech programme in Automobile Engineering, Civil Engineering, Electrical Engineering, Mechanical Engineering, Computer Science & Engineering, Electrical & Electronics Engineering, and others. The below-mentioned are Nigam Institute of Engineering and Technology popular programmes:

Nigam Institute of Engineering and Technology admission 2025 is open. The institute offers admission based on merit and entrance exams. The institute accepts national entrance exams such as JEE Main, OJEE, and others. Aspiring candidates must qualify for the eligibility criteria set by the institute for the desired course. NIET course admission begins with the online application. Interested students must qualify for the eligibility criteria set by the institute for the desired course. The below-mentioned are Nigam Institute of Engineering and Technology admissions for 2025:

At the UG level, the institute offers BTech and BVoc courses. At the PG level, the institute offers an MTech programme in Thermal Engineering and Power Electronics & Drives. faqs.question: Q: What are the courses offered at Nigam Institute of Engineering and Technology?

faqs.answer: Nigam Institute of Engineering and Technology has below criteria for taking admissions to it's various courses: CoursesEligibilityB.E. / B.TechCandidate must have passed 10+2 examination with any three subjects out of 14 subjects (Physics/ Mathematics / Chemistry/ Computer Science/ Electronics/ Information Technology/ Biology/ Informatics Practices/ Biotechnology/Technical Vocational subject/ Agriculture/ Engineering Graphics/ Business Studies/ Entrepreneurship) and obtained at least 45% marks for general (40% marks for in case of candidates belonging to reserved category) in the above subjects taken together.M.E./M.TechCandidate must have completed Bachelor degree or equivalent in the relevant field of engineering and technology with above mentioned marks from any recognised University/Institute. 45% marks in case of candidates belonging to reserved category.After 10th DiplomaCandidate passed 10th class/equivalent conducted by BSE, Odisha/equivalent are eligible to apply. The lower age limit is 14 years and there is no upper age limit.
faqs.question: Q: How can I get into Nigam Institute of Engineering and Technology for UG/PG courses? Am I eligible for admission?

faqs.answer: Nigam Institute of Engineering and Technology application process is as follows: Step 1: Apply for OJEE and participate in the counselling process for seat allotment.Step 2: Select NIET as the desired college.Step 3: Visit the official website of the institute and click on the "Apply Now" tab shown on the homepage.Step 4: Download and fill out the application form duly.Step 5: Submit it to the institute to complete the process.
faqs.question: Q: How can I apply for Nigam Institute of Engineering and Technology?

faqs.answer: No, Nigam Institute of Engineering and Technology (NIET Odisha) does not offer direct admissions for any of its courses. Students seeking to get into the institute need to ensure that they fulfil both the eligibility and selection criteria of the desired programme. The institute selects students primarily on an entrance basis for its UG and PG courses. However, even merit-based admissions require students to pass the last qualifying exam.

admission_process.title: Nigam Institute of Engineering and Technology Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: Nigam Institute of Engineering and Technology admission 2025is primarily entrance-based. The institute also commonly known asNIEToffers undergraduate, postgraduate, and diploma programmes in the field of Engineering. Students seeking to get into the institute need to provide valid scores obtained in the accepted entrance exam to be eligible for admission. Students can also pursue several Vocational programmes, such as Software Development, Autotronics, etc at the institute. Interested students can read the following article to know all about the courses, eligibility criteria, and admission process of the institute.

NIET course admissionis made on the basis of preset admission criteria. The institute accepts students based on their academic performance along with valid scores obtained in the accepted exam. The institute is affiliated with BPUT Odisha. Students can pursue BTech, MTech, diploma, and vocational programmes at the institute. It is important that aspirants satisfy the admission criteria before applying. The table contains information for the eligibility and selection criteria for popularNIET courses:

The admission process for Nigam Institute of Engineering and Technology includes several steps, such as application, selection, and counselling, followed by admission confirmation. Find below the steps to complete theNIET admission process:
Step 1: Application Process

Students applying for the institute need to first ensure whether they fulfil the admission criteria of OJEE as admissions for the BTech and MTech courses are entrance-based. Those who meet the eligibility need to apply for the exam.
Step 2: Selection Process

The institute shortlists students based on several parameters. Students seeking admission into the UG and PG programmes need to either appear for the state-level entrance exam, i.e., OJEE, or provide a valid score obtained in accepted tests, such as JEE.
Step 3: Admission Confirmation

Seat allotment is done through counselling. At the time of counselling, students need to select the desired programme. Once an admission offer is made, students need to pay theNIET admission feesfor seat confirmation.

reviews_list.review_title: Review of Anuradha Engineering College.

review_content.Placements: Top companies like Infosys won't visit our campus. The highest salary package offered in the previous year was 10 LPA. Our college does not provide placements for all students. Some recruiting companies are TCS, Persistent System, etc. The salary package offered is 5 LPA.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of our college is good. A private boys' hostel is near our college. Our college has a girls' hostel. We have a huge indoor stadium near our college. Our college has a huge ground. It has a huge library. It has a lot of books.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2025
reviews_list.review_title: Good college for engineering in Buldhana district. Good placements last year (2020-21).

review_content.Placements: I have positive feedback about the college. I'm in my first year that's why I don't have much information about placements. But I have heard that many students get placed in there final year. The highest package offered last year was 12 LPA. And the lowest was near to 2 LPA. The college does every possible thing for the students to get placed. Companies like- tcs, persistent systems, byjus, Capgemini, Infosys, etc.
review_content.Infrastructure: College infrastructure is good. Currently the college canteen is not open because of covid but it will start very soon. Hostel is available. The college organises nss camps, workshops, sport competition, etc. As extra curricular activities. Projector based learning is there in the college. But the college needs coloring.

individual_reviews.title: College infrastructure, faculty, campus is very good.

content.Placements: College has the best history about placement. Up to 3000 students are placed in higher positions in the corporate area. Many students are placed in foreign countries. Every year, up to 100 students are placed on campus. Many companies are coming for campus placements.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of the college is very good. Hi-tech classrooms, newly developed computer labs, the biggest library, seminar hall, and indoor stadium. content.Placements: Top companies like Infosys won't visit our campus. The highest salary package offered in the previous year was 10 LPA. Our college does not provide placements for all students. Some recruiting companies are TCS, Persistent System, etc. The salary package offered is 5 LPA.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of our college is good. A private boys' hostel is near our college. Our college has a girls' hostel. We have a huge indoor stadium near our college. Our college has a huge ground. It has a huge library. It has a lot of books.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Good college for engineering in Buldhana district. Good placements last year (2020-21).

content.Placements: I have positive feedback about the college. I'm in my first year that's why I don't have much information about placements. But I have heard that many students get placed in there final year. The highest package offered last year was 12 LPA. And the lowest was near to 2 LPA. The college does every possible thing for the students to get placed. Companies like- tcs, persistent systems, byjus, Capgemini, Infosys, etc.
content.Infrastructure: College infrastructure is good. Currently the college canteen is not open because of covid but it will start very soon. Hostel is available. The college organises nss camps, workshops, sport competition, etc. As extra curricular activities. Projector based learning is there in the college. But the college needs coloring.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Information Technology - Batch of 2020
individual_reviews.title: Review of Anuradha Engineering College.

content.Placements: Candidates are eligible for campus placements from the 3rd year, i.e., after the 5th semester. The placement percentage is up to 100% approximately, and the average package is 1 LPA, and the highest package on campus is about 13 LPA.
content.Infrastructure: All the facilities are available in the hostel, such as Wi-Fi with speed up to 1 GBps. The hostel also has a mess facility, included in the hostel fee itself. The hostel is on the campus itself. The fee is affordable. Students can also get a scholarship on hostel fees. The registration process of the hostel is carried out by the college itself.

faqs.question: What can students do after JEE Main session 2 result?
faqs.answer: After JEE session 2 is completed, only those candidates who are aiming for IITs need to start preparing for JEE Advanced after clearing JEE Main. Those who are above the 98th percentile should start preparing for JEE Advanced as soon as possible. Those below this, between the 95th and 98th percentile, should focus on attempting more mock tests and previous year question papers so that they have a better chance of clearing JEE Advanced

The Joint Seat Allocation Authority (JoSAA) will start the registration for JEE Main Counselling 2024 on June 10. A total of 6 rounds of JEE Main 2024 counselling will be conducted.

Anuradha Engineering College cutoff 2025 was released via MHT CET entrance exam for admission to the B.E. / B.Tech course. For the General AI category students, the last round cutoff range was between 72305 and 435505 for B.E. / B.Tech admission. Considering the lowest cutoff rank of 72305, B.Tech. in Chemical Engineering turned out to be the most competitive branch for admission. In the first round, the cutoff rank for the same branch was 676364.
Considering the JEE Main last round cutoff 2025 for the General AI category students, the top most competitive course for admission was B.E. / B.Tech, with a cutoff rank closing at 72305.

For the same competitive branch/course, the last round cutoff was 32.18 in the General category under the HS quota.

reviews.review_heading: College infrastructure, faculty, campus is very good.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college is very good. Hi-tech classrooms, newly developed computer labs, the biggest library, seminar hall, and indoor stadium. The college campus is very big. Every lab has a separate Wi-Fi connection. The college hostel building is so big, with a capacity of more than 150 students. The canteen food is also good.

reviews.review_heading: Our college provides good infrastructure and facilities.
reviews.review_text: Our campus was well-maintained. All laboratories were well-equipped. Classrooms were air-conditioned. Our college provided the latest technology equipment for practicals. Playground was available for sports. There was a food outlet on our campus. High-speed Wi-Fi was available. Whiteboards and projectors were available in our classrooms.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Anuradha Engineering College.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is good. A private boys' hostel is near our college. Our college has a girls' hostel. We have a huge indoor stadium near our college. Our college has a huge ground. It has a huge library. It has a lot of books.

reviews.review_heading: Good college for engineering in Buldhana district. Good placements last year (2020-21).
reviews.review_text: College infrastructure is good. Currently the college canteen is not open because of covid but it will start very soon. Hostel is available. The college organises nss camps, workshops, sport competition, etc. As extra curricular activities. Projector based learning is there in the college. But the college needs coloring.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Anuradha Engineering College.
reviews.review_text: All the facilities are available in the hostel, such as Wi-Fi with speed up to 1 GBps. The hostel also has a mess facility, included in the hostel fee itself. The hostel is on the campus itself. The fee is affordable. Students can also get a scholarship on hostel fees. The registration process of the hostel is carried out by the college itself.

reviews.review_heading: It is the best college in nearby localities with a good infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi facility is available 24x7 at our college campus. Classrooms are clean and neat in our college. Every classroom has a separate projector for learning and studying. In our hostel, the food served is delicious and healthy. Every year sports events are conducted in our college.

reviews.review_heading: It is a good college, but it is incompetent to run by the management.
reviews.review_text: Our college has a library, labs and classrooms, but it lacks the Wi-Fi facility. The boy's hostel was shut down in the previous year, and only the girl's hostel is running now. But I didn't know much about the girl's hostel. There is a canteen, but for half of the semester, it is closed, while the other half of the semester, it is open only for providing tea.

reviews.review_heading: Our college is the best for me. Faculty members are good and supportive.
reviews.review_text: The campus and classrooms are nice. The staff are supportive. Wi-Fi facility is available, but it can only be used for laptops. There is an indoor stadium available, and there are good library facilities. The canteen facility is also good with varieties of food items. Our college is good regarding all the facilities.

college_info.intro:
Ahmedabad University Gujarat popular programmes are MBA, BSc, BBA, BCom Professional, and others. Ahmedabad University has a project-based approach and offers a design-driven curriculum for students. The Ahmedabad University Ahmedabad MBA students gain real-world experiential learning and an appreciation of cultural, social, and ethical contexts within which a business is known to operate. The students are taught to become better leaders, better human beings, and better citizens.
Ahmedabad University has set up various teaching labs to offer quality education to students. Some of the labs set up by the university are the Chemical Engineering Laboratory, Computer Science and Engineering Laboratory, and others. Below mentioned are some of the courses offered by Ahmedabad University and their respective eligibility, and the Ahmedabad University MBA fees and AU BBA fees structure 2026:

student_insights.feedback: Students can work with faculty on research projects
Many students started their own start-ups
Many students looking for better jobs
Strong alumni network that help with placement opportunities
Very Active and resourceful, college is also involved

faqs.question: What is the average package offered at Ahmedabad University?

faqs.answer: A:    Ahmedabad University's placement cell offers career counselling and planning, and has career development workshops and interactions with industry leaders for its students. The cell focuses on industry engagement by conducting guest lectures, seminars, and encouraging students to take up research projects. Placement and internship assistance is also provided to the students with campus-to-corporate training as well.
faqs.question: What are the activities conducted during Ahmedabad University placements?

faqs.answer: A:    Yes, the University has a Career Development Centre (CDC) that facilitates students' connections with organisations in the corporate world that match their goals. The CDC is committed to working with students at all levels of their career aspirations, from understanding students interests to a judicious assessment of the same, from providing networking opportunities to equipping them with job searching strategies. It functions as the nodal office for the University's corporate relations.
faqs.question: Does Ahmedabad University has a placement cell?

fees_and_eligibility.overview: Ahmedabad University offers UG, PG, and other courses to students. These courses are provided across the Engineering, Management, and various other streams. At the UG level, the university offers Ahmedabad University BTech, BA, BSc, Ahmedabad University BBA, and others. At the PG level, the Ahmedabad University Gujarat offers a two-year full-time Ahmedabad University MBA, MSQF, and others. There is also Lateral Entry option available for several UG and PG courses at this university, such as BCom Professional (Hons), BS (Hons), BA (Hons), BSM (Hons), BCom (Hons), Integrated MBA, Integrated MS, andBelow mentioned are some of the Ahmedabad University courses, and their respective eligibility, and Ahmedabad University MBA fees and Ahmedabad University BBA fees:

However, some fee components, such as the application fee and security deposit, must be paid at the time of admission. reviews_list.review_title: Details about Ahmedabad University.

review_content.Placements: I got to know about placement through recent data, where I found that in AU, the placement rate is 97 percent in UG as well as PG. As a student at AU, I would like to confess that it is true. I also asked my senior about this, and many of my seniors got their placements in the first place.
review_content.Infrastructure: Ahmedabad University provides the best hostel facility. Recently, they made their own hostel away from the university, which is very helpful for us to stay away from the university noise. They also provide a shuttle facility for us every 15 minutes so that it will not cause any delay for classes. Their rooms just feel like home with friends.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Com. (Professional) in Accounting - Batch of 2028
reviews_list.review_title: Ahmedabad University: Strong Academics, Supportive Faculty and a Student-Friendly Campus.

review_content.Placements: Placements at Ahmedabad University reflect the overall strong performance of the university's Career Development Centre. The highest package is around 14.71 LPA, and the top recruits are like Adani, Asian Paints, Berger Paints, etc. Around 80 to 90 students in B.Com secured internships through the university CDC support.
review_content.Infrastructure: Campus facilities are well maintained, with clean rooms, classrooms and regular housekeeping in hostels. 24-hour security, Common areas and high-speed internet. The mess food is decent and hygienic, with a changing menu. The university also provides good medical facilities, including an on-campus health centre.

review_summary.college_name: Ahmedabad University Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: Master of Business Administration (MBA) - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: College is good; I recommend.

content.Placements: 90% of students were placed through campus placements. The highest is around 16 LPA, and the average is 7-8 LPA. Roles are good for finance and marketing. Internships are available in many firms like FMCG, consulting, IT, teaching, and even telecom businesses, and they prepare us well for placements.
content.Infrastructure: The services provided are good, and the campus is really nice. Wi-Fi services are available, and the labs and classrooms are better than most out there. The canteen is really good, and the food is tasty and healthy too. Medical facilities and sports are also well taken care of.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2029
individual_reviews.title: Amazing experience for new students.

content.Placements: I recently got admitted to Ahmedabad University and am currently studying there. The placements here are average. The university placement percentage is 60-70 percent, and the average package is approximately 6 LPA to 7 LPA. It is a very decent placement.
content.Infrastructure: There is very nice infrastructure of the university. The university buildings and infrastructure are very impressive, and the campus is huge. There are separate buildings for all the different courses. The main building is the UC, which stands for University Centre, and it houses a cafeteria, a student lounge, and a multipurpose hall.

individual_reviews.course: B.Com. (Hons.) in Accounting - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Details about Ahmedabad University.

content.Placements: I got to know about placement through recent data, where I found that in AU, the placement rate is 97 percent in UG as well as PG. As a student at AU, I would like to confess that it is true. I also asked my senior about this, and many of my seniors got their placements in the first place.
content.Infrastructure: Ahmedabad University provides the best hostel facility. Recently, they made their own hostel away from the university, which is very helpful for us to stay away from the university noise. They also provide a shuttle facility for us every 15 minutes so that it will not cause any delay for classes. Their rooms just feel like home with friends.

individual_reviews.course: B.Com. (Professional) in Accounting - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Ahmedabad University: Strong Academics, Supportive Faculty and a Student-Friendly Campus.

content.Placements: Placements at Ahmedabad University reflect the overall strong performance of the university's Career Development Centre. The highest package is around 14.71 LPA, and the top recruits are like Adani, Asian Paints, Berger Paints, etc. Around 80 to 90 students in B.Com secured internships through the university CDC support.
content.Infrastructure: Campus facilities are well maintained, with clean rooms, classrooms and regular housekeeping in hostels. 24-hour security, Common areas and high-speed internet. The mess food is decent and hygienic, with a changing menu. The university also provides good medical facilities, including an on-campus health centre.

individual_reviews.course: MMS in Heritage Management - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Chimney room of Ahmedabad University.

content.Placements: Our department doesn't have placements, but the opportunities and exposure it gives sure do make up for that. There are talks and conferences that you can be a part of, projects you can take up to showcase your interests and skill sets.
content.Infrastructure: The CHM building is by far the most "homely" building in AU, and the hostels are comfortable. With all the facilities you could ask for. CHM houses its very own conservation lab, and the hostel is a rather pleasant place to live in, with 24/7 Wi-Fi and security.

admission_overview.title: Ahmedabad University Admission Overview 2026
admission_overview.description: Ahmedabad University Admission 2026 is open now. The University comprises three schools and five centres. They collectively offer undergraduate and postgraduate programmes in the fields of Engineering, Commerce, Humanities, Management and Sciences. The university also offers PhD courses. Admission to all the UG and PG courses at Ahmedabad University is both merit-based. The University accepts national-level entrance exams like JEE Main/CAT/MAT/CMAT/GATE and GUJCET. Students seeking admission to Ahmedabad University must apply through its official website.

admission_process.title: Ahmedabad University Admission Process 2026

paragraphs: For the university's flagship course, students need to complete theJEE Main/CAT/CMAT/ NMAT/GATE/ application process and take the test. For other courses such as BBA, BSc, MA, etc. applications can be directly submitted through Ahmedabad University's official website. Further, the Ahmedabad University admission process is explained below:1: Ahmedabad University Application Process 2026The Ahmedabad University application process is carried out in online mode. Candidates must register and fill out the online application form with the required details for admission.2: Written Ability Test (WAT)/ Personal Interview (PI) Round/ Other Selection RoundsCandidates shortlisted on merit in the JEE Main/CAT/CMAT entrance test and academic merit have to take the WAT/PI round. Further, a commutative score is calculated for final selections. For the other programmes, students who fulfil the minimum eligibility are shortlisted based on course-specific selection criteria. For the MMSHM course offered at Ahmedabad University, the candidates need to take the Heritage Management Test (HMAT) and pay the application fee of INR 1.200.3: Declaration of Final Merit ListFollowing the conclusion of all the selection rounds, the institute may publish a category-wise merit list. Students who make it to the merit list become eligible for admission.4: Admission ConfirmationThe selected candidates can further confirm their seats by paying the course admission fee.

faqs.question: Which entrance exam is accepted for BTech at Ahmedabad University?
faqs.answer: Ahmedabad University offers admission to BTech through national/state-level entrance exam. Those who belong to Gujarat domicile can apply via a valid score of GUJCET as per the ACPC norms. Admission to candidates from outside of Gujarat is offered based on the scores of JEE Main. The university allocates 50% of seats to the JEE Main qualifiers through group counselling and the remaining 50% of seats are allocated through ACPC based on GUJCET scores to students belonging to the Gujarat domicile.

faqs.question: Can I get direct admission in Ahmedabad University?
faqs.answer: Yes, direct admissions for its undergraduate programs like BBA, BSc, BA are offered in Ahmedabad University without any particular entrance test. Most of the UG and PG courses are admitted based on valid scores of state or national-level entrance exams. For professional programs such as MBA and BTech admission is on the basis of entrance tests like CAT, XAT, JEE Main, or the AMSOM entrance test provided by Ahmedabad University.

faqs.question: What to do after JEE Main session 2 result?
faqs.answer: Candidates preparing for Ahmedabad are only required to appear for the JEE Main entrance exam. Further, they should decide their preferences before the start of the JEE Main counselling.

college_info.college_name: Ahmedabad University Scholarship Details

paragraphs: Ahmedabad University offers merit scholarships of up to INR 2,00,000 upon admission to applicants with CAT 2024 scores of more than 90 percentile. Additional scholarships of up to INR 2,00,000 will be awarded upon admission to applicants who demonstrate high accomplishments with their test scores in other valid entrance tests, in their undergraduate degrees in Engineering, Technology, and Architecture, and with full-time work experience in reputable organisations.
DFP-Banner
Mentioned below are details about the type of scholarships offered at Ahmedabad University

1. Ahmedabad Fellowships: Under this, students are provided with a 100 percent waiver of the tuition fees and this is renewed annually for four/ five years for the Bachelors / Integrated Masters course duration.

2. Ahmedabad Scholarships: Under this, a one-time 100 percent tuition fee waiver (along with a waiver on hostel fees) is awarded in the second semester as an Ahmedabad Scholarship, during admission to the UG and Integrated PG courses.
3. Merit Scholarships: This scholarship is awarded from the second year onward to the highest-scoring students of each course based on their academic performance.
4. Mahatma Gandhi Scholarships: This scholarship is offered to a maximum of ten students in a year across all programmes and majors offered at Ahmedabad University.

5. Need-Based Scholarships: The Need-Based Scholarship offered at AU include either a partial or full waiver on the tuition fee. The amount of this scholarship is determined by the student’s family's annual income.

The final decision on this scholarship is taken after the assessment of the family income, expenditure pattern, and assets and after a personal visit to the family residence/ business by an independent audit agency.

NOTE: Students must note that in case they qualify for both an Academic and a Need-Based Scholarship, the Academic Scholarship will be awarded first, and the Need-Based Scholarship will be awarded on the balance (if any).

6. College Board India Scholars Programme for New Students: A 100 percent fee waiver on tuition fees is provided to the top scorers in the SAT from India for the duration of their UG degree. Interested students are required to complete their application formalities with the college board to be considered for the scholarship.

Interested candidates must write to the Office of Undergraduate Admissions and Financial Aid for information on the application for Academic and Need-Based Scholarships. The email id is scholarships@ahduni.edu.in.
DISCLAIMER: The scholarship stats mentioned in the above page are obtained from the official website and are subject to change.

reviews_list.review_title: Best college for studies.

review_content.Placements: 7 CGPA and above is needed for the placement. The highest package of our college is 46 LPA and the lowest package of our college is 3 LPA. Google , Amazon,Wipro , HCL are top companies. The maximum percentage of students got internships from their courses in top companies like TCS. The top roles offered in our course are computer knowledge.
review_content.Infrastructure: 24/7 Wi-Fi availability, each floor has its computer labs, each building has its own library. Food is awesome, the room is quite good and well maintained . Every single thing in our college is well maintained from food to studies and especially the food in the canteen is very hygienic and tasty.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Information Technology - Batch of 2025
reviews_list.review_title: College is good but if you have skills you can choose any college.

review_content.Placements: The placement percentage for this college is 40%, with the highest package being 6 lacs and the lowest package being 2.2 lacs. TCS and Wipro are the major recruiters. The college focuses on software and web development, and students need to have a good understanding of data structures and algorithms to be successful in the placement process. The internship percentage is very low compared to other colleges.
review_content.Infrastructure: The hostel was good, but the food in the mess was not good. The college classrooms did not have air conditioning, and sports were not that important to the college. The projector worked well, and the management was good. The medical facilities were not that good.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering (AI) - Batch of 2025
reviews_list.review_title: I am satisfied with our college and its placements.

review_content.Placements: Around 80% of B.Tech students get successfully placed every year in various organisations. Top recruiting companies are Accenture, Josh Technologies, Telaverge Communications, and Reliance Industries. The salary package offered is more than 7 LPA. review_content.Infrastructure: Our college provides great facilities and infrastructure. All labs are fully air-conditioned. The desktops work well and are up-to-date with the software. Our classrooms have smart boards and projectors where our teachers focus on the visual aspect of the course. The library contains books that are in good condition. The coursebooks are up-to-date with the versions. The quality of the hostel is also good. The wardens are helpful. The food served in the mess is good. The menu keeps changing every month so that students do not get bored with the same food. Fruits are available for breakfast and sweet dishes are provided for dinner. Many other options are available in the mess. The medical facilities are satisfying. In case of any emergency, the hosteller is taken immediately to the hospital in an ambulance accompanied by the warden.

review_summary.college_name: Babu Banarasi Das Engineering College Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering (AI) - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: It is a good college in every aspect.

content.Placements: More than 90% of students got placements. The highest salary package offered is 45 LPA. The lowest salary package offered is 3 LPA. The average salary package offered is 6 LPA. Top recruiting companies are Google, TCS, Infosys, HCL, Amazon, and Wipro. Around 89% of students got internships from our course in the above-listed companies. Top roles offered are software engineer, web developer, etc.
content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi is good. It provides a very high-speed internet connection. Our classrooms are spacious. It gives us a perfect environment for us to learn properly. The library is big as it provides each book for our course. The quality of hostels is good as it provides highly maintained dorms and food.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Information Technology - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Great faculty and placements.

content.Placements: In our B.Tech electronics and communication course, around 85% of students got placed. The highest salary package offered is 25 LPA. The lowest salary package offered is 4 LPA. The average salary package offered is 8 LPA. Top recruiters included TCS, Infosys, Wipro, and Qualcomm. About 65% secured internships in firms like Intel and Samsung. Mainly roles offered are software engineer, communication engineer, and systems analyst.
content.Infrastructure: Our B.Tech ECE department offers excellent facilities, including high-speed Wi-Fi, well-equipped labs, and spacious classrooms. The library is stocked with relevant resources. Hostels provide good living conditions. The mess serves quality food. Medical facilities are available, along with sports and games for recreation.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering (AI) - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Best college for studies.

content.Placements: 7 CGPA and above is needed for the placement. The highest package of our college is 46 LPA and the lowest package of our college is 3 LPA. Google , Amazon,Wipro , HCL are top companies. The maximum percentage of students got internships from their courses in top companies like TCS. The top roles offered in our course are computer knowledge.
content.Infrastructure: 24/7 Wi-Fi availability, each floor has its computer labs, each building has its own library. Food is awesome, the room is quite good and well maintained . Every single thing in our college is well maintained from food to studies and especially the food in the canteen is very hygienic and tasty.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Information Technology - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: College is good but if you have skills you can choose any college.

content.Placements: The placement percentage for this college is 40%, with the highest package being 6 lacs and the lowest package being 2.2 lacs. TCS and Wipro are the major recruiters. The college focuses on software and web development, and students need to have a good understanding of data structures and algorithms to be successful in the placement process. The internship percentage is very low compared to other colleges.
content.Infrastructure: The hostel was good, but the food in the mess was not good. The college classrooms did not have air conditioning, and sports were not that important to the college. The projector worked well, and the management was good. The medical facilities were not that good.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering (AI) - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: I am satisfied with our college and its placements.

content.Placements: Around 80% of B.Tech students get successfully placed every year in various organisations. Top recruiting companies are Accenture, Josh Technologies, Telaverge Communications, and Reliance Industries. The salary package offered is more than 7 LPA. Top roles offered in the B.Tech course are software developer, quality assurance, and operations manager.
content.Infrastructure: Our college provides great facilities and infrastructure. All labs are fully air-conditioned. The desktops work well and are up-to-date with the software. Our classrooms have smart boards and projectors where our teachers focus on the visual aspect of the course. The library contains books that are in good condition. The coursebooks are up-to-date with the versions. The quality of the hostel is also good. The wardens are helpful. The food served in the mess is good. The menu keeps changing every month so that students do not get bored with the same food. Fruits are available for breakfast and sweet dishes are provided for dinner. Many other options are available in the mess. The medical facilities are satisfying. In case of any emergency, the hosteller is taken immediately to the hospital in an ambulance accompanied by the warden.

reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of classrooms is well-maintained. All classrooms have cameras for security and to monitor students. They have projectors for better understanding. review_summary.college_name: Geethanjali Institute of Science And Technology, Kovur Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Electronics and Electrical Engineering - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: The college is very good.

content.Placements: In our college, we will get 70 percent of placements. The top recruiting companies for our course are Infosys and Accenture. 50 percent of students get internships. It offers courses like computer science, electronics and communication, electrical engineering, mechanical engineering, and AI-ML. The highest package offered is 10 LPA, and the lowest package offered is 2 LPA.
content.Infrastructure: We have labs which are very useful, and the library is literally very good. The canteen food is also good. There are different types of food in the canteen. The food also tastes very good. Classrooms are really very neat and have a big blackboard. Wi-Fi facility is good.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering (Cyber Security) - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: Geethanjali Institute of Science and Technology.

content.Placements: In our college, students with at least a 7 GPA get a job in placement. The highest average package is 9 LPA and the lowest package is 6 LPA. Students get internships, and the top companies like Infosys, Google, etc., offer job opportunities in our college.
content.Infrastructure: In our college, we have Wi-Fi, classrooms are good, and an AC library. We also have a volleyball and basketball court, cricket ground, chess, table tennis, etc.
content.Faculty: In our college, the teachers are very professional and experienced. They teach valuable things in the concepts. They clarify our doubts in very easy and unique ways, which is very interesting for students. The exams are very difficult and the pass percentage is 37% in every subject.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Overall, a decent college with good and experienced faculty.

content.Placements: The placements inside the campus are not the best but training for the placement they provide is good. They collaborate with the other companies to develop our skills. Few students got a decent package from companies like Airbus, etc. As of now, the placement percentage is low but it can increase in upcoming years.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of the college is good enough for the students. The classrooms are comfortable for 70 students. Labs are decent. College has a good library with a lot of books to refer to. College has a single canteen inside the campus. The quality of food in the mess is decent.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: About the college infrastructure and faculty.

content.Placements: The percentage of students placed in our college is less than 10 percent. The highest package is 8 LPA, the average is 4 LPA, and the lowest is 1.5 LPA. Accenture was the top recruiting company that visited our college. I am in the 3rd year, and so far, there have been no internships offered by the college.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of the college is good. The library is large and has books for all departments. There is Wi-Fi in the college, but it is always off. Labs exist in name only. The mess food is not good, but the hostel is better. There is no proper ground in the college.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2021
individual_reviews.title: I am not satisfied with placements in 2024.

content.Placements: Around 60% of students got placed in our college. The highest salary offered is around Rs. 50,000 per month. The lowest salary offered is around Rs. 30,000 per month. Top recruiting companies are Infosys, Global Bank, etc. Students who score above 70% got internships in companies like Infosys, Swiggy, etc.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of our college is very good. Cleanliness and other things are good. Wi-Fi is not available in our college. But it is available in labs and some other places. The library is good. We have to maintain silence in libraries. The food served in the canteen is good. They serve the same curries but the taste is a bit good.

faqs.question: How can I get into Geethanjali Institute of Science And Technology, Kovur for UG/PG courses? Am I eligible for admission?
faqs.answer:
Geethanjali Institute of Science And Technology, Kovur has below criteria for taking admissions to it's various courses:CoursesEligibilityM.E./M.TechCandidate must have passed B.E./B.Tech. in relevant stream and obtained with the above mentioned marks (45% in case of reserved category candidates) from an AICTE/UGC approved institution recognised by the Government of Andhra Pradesh as equivalent thereto.
Final year appearing students may also apply on provisional basis.B.E. / B.TechCandidates who have passed Diploma in Engineering or any other examination recognised as equivalent there to, from a recognised Institute/ University, Andhra Pradesh/ Telangana are also eligible.
Candidates who have appeared in Diploma in Engineering and who are awaiting their results can also apply on provisional basis.
Candidates should belong to the state of Andhra Pradesh/ Telangana.
Candidate should have completed 16 years of age as of 31st December of the year of admission (2023).
There is no upper age

reviews.review_text: The college is so good and the atmosphere is also so good with good and better infrastructure, and the campus is full Wi-Fi campus with digital labs and library. reviews.review_heading: Review of Geethanjali Institute of Science And Technology, Kovur.
reviews.review_text: Providing labs and Wi-Fi in college, the library has 4000 plus books, including competitive exam books. Every class has a projector. Good food and 24hr Wi-Fi are available. The canteen is good, with excellent food, and there's a gym facility. Sports are encouraged, and students participate in university tournaments as well.

reviews.review_heading: It is good for an engineering student who wants to study in Nellore.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is very nice in our college. We have fully Wi-Fi labs and classrooms. There are digital classrooms available. In our hostel, 24 hours electricity is available and the food is good. We have AC rooms also and we have a doctor available for girls in the hostel. For boys, we have a medical ambulance. We have all the types of sports available. We can play any game or sport.

reviews.review_heading: Geethanjaali engineering college.
reviews.review_text: The hostels are good. We want to check and take rooms as early as. Because there are only some good hostels. The food is also good. But don't expect more. The environment of the college is good to stay and secure. Otherwise, it is near to Nellore town we can stay in town.

reviews.review_heading: Our college provides very good infrastructure and placements.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi was provided in the hostel. Library was available to study. There was a playground to play cricket. Good food was served by the hostel wardens and the hostel was under CCTV surveillance. Our college conducted cricket matches every 3 months based on their age groups like A team, B team, etc.

reviews.review_heading: Before joining Diploma, you need to see this.
reviews.review_text: There are so many facilities in our college, such as transportation, hostel facilities, a mess in the college, and a good ground for playing, and we have sports days every year. The quality of the food in the mess is very good, and it is healthy too. At our college, there are also medical facilities available.

reviews.review_heading: I recommend students to take admission to this college.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our department is very good. DLD lab has many physical items such as breadboards, wires, AC meter junctions, diode transistors resistors, PNP diode resistors, ohmmeter, and EDC. Labs are great to do experiments and project-related work.

reviews.review_heading: Join this college without any doubt.
reviews.review_text: Very well-equipped computer labs with many systems working fine and software like DevC, AutoCAD, Hadoop, Argouml, and many more testing tools for the lab practicals are available, and they will teach very well. Yes, we have Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms, and a central library with a lot of books and a very good organization with all items available.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely satisfied with the college.
reviews.review_text: Geethanjali Institute of Science and Technology provides excellent features and infrastructure that cater to students and faculty alike. The institute is equipped with modern technology and uses high-quality technologies to provide better education. It's a free wi-fi campus. The hostel and food facilities are amazing, and the quality is 4 out of 5.

The library is very updated, and we can get the books for every semester. If there is a change in the syllabus, we don't need to panic.

Classrooms are neatly maintained. The facilities in the hostel are not satisfactory.

review_content.Placements: I don't know the percentage, but I guess nearly twenty students have been placed through campus drive across different companies. There are many companies that are coming to the college; the only thing is that the students here take studies for granted and don't read.

Candidates who have appeared in Diploma in Engineering and who are awaiting their results can also apply on provisional basis. Candidates should belong to the state of Andhra Pradesh/ Telangana. Candidate should have completed 16 years of age as of 31st December of the year of admission (2023). There is no upper age limit.M.E./M.TechCandidate must have passsed B.E./B.Tech. in relevant stream and obtained at least 50% marks (45% in case of reserved category candidates) from an AICTE/UGC approved institution recognised by the Government of Andhra Pradesh as equivalent thereto. Final year appearing students may also apply on provisional basis.MBA/PGDMCandidate must have completed Bachelor degree of 3/4 years duration with above mentioned marks from any recognised University/Institute. 45% marks for BC categories. Candidate who are appearing for the final year degree examination are also be eligible. Degree obtained by Distance Mode Program should have recognition by Joint Committee of UGC, AICTE and DEC/DEB. Candidate who passed all the subjects of the three years of any Degree course in one sitting is not eligible for admission.After 10th DiplomaCandidates should have passed S.S.C. Examination (Class 10th) conducted by State Board of Secondary Education, Andhra Pradesh/ Telangana or any other examination recognised as equivalent thereto by the Board of Secondary Education, A.P/TS. such as CBSE, ICSE, NIOS, A.P. Open School Society (APOSS), X class examination conducted by various State Boards of Secondary Education in India with Mathematics as one of the subjects. review_summary.college_name: Chaitanya Engineering College Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: This is a great place for learning.

content.Placements: Maximum percentage of students got placements with a good package. The highest salary is 22 LPA, and this college offers various on-campus offers in Concentric and all. There are many various projects and internships that help us in our final year for job opportunities.
content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure and all are very good, and the atmosphere of the college is great and it's peaceful. The labs are very well reserved with well equipment. Faculty members also help us with the labs, and we can do experiments by ourslef with the help of the teachers.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: This is my review of my college.

content.Placements: Placements at Chaithanya are very basic. Most of the companies are showing very interest in Chaitanya to recruit students. Several students have been placed in top Indian companies like Infosys, Tata Steel, and Accenture, with the highest package reaching 7 LPA.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure at Chaithanya is quite basic but of good quality, including classrooms equipped with digital labs and a neat, clean playground. The washrooms are hygienic, and the canteen offers basic-quality food. The labs are of excellent quality, and hostel rooms are clean and hygienic.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Electronics and Communication Engineering - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Really good faculty and good facilities with the lowest fees, but with average faculty.

content.Placements: I don't know the percentage, but I guess nearly twenty students have been placed through campus drive across different companies. There are many companies that are coming to the college; the only thing is that the students here take studies for granted and don't read.
content.Infrastructure: We will get basic facilities and infrastructure, and there is no Wi-Fi. As for the food in the mess, it is okay, but my friends sometimes don't eat there because of the quality. The canteen is better than the mess, and many of the hostellers usually tend to eat here if the food in the mess is not good.

individual_reviews.course: Diploma in Computer Engineering - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: Dissatisfied Because of Placements and Internship and Really Good faculty members and Facilities.

content.Placements: There are no placements or companies visiting the college. The college does not provide any internships, so we have to find them on our own. There are no roles offered by the college, and it does not support placement in any way. The overall placement situation is very disappointing.
content.Infrastructure: The college doesn't provide the Wi-Fi password to students. Lab rooms are big and spacious. Computers are working properly. Classrooms are also spacious and good. In the library, there are many books for students. We have a college canteen where the taste of the food is quite good but not reasonable (little high budget). Hostel rooms are good. They provide a single bed for a student. Hostel food is quite bad. Students don't like hostel food. Medical facilities mean the hostel may have medicine and first aid, but there are no medical facilities, I observed.

individual_reviews.course: Diploma in Electronics and Communication Engineering - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: This is my opinion about my college.

content.Placements: Actually, during the Diploma stage, I think it's not good for jobs because we can't upgrade or get promotions through a Diploma job. It's much better after completing a B.Tech. So, there are very few placements for Diploma holders, not just in my college but generally. When it comes to internships, it's necessary to do one in the final year. Marks are allocated for this internship, and we can select from different companies listed.
content.Infrastructure: I initially joined this college because of the infrastructure and campus locality. The infrastructure is awesome, but there's no Wi-Fi available for students. The labs are also fine for me, and the classrooms are spacious with good air ventilation, in my opinion. The library is also good; we can borrow any book we want from there. I am a day scholar, so I don't know much about hostel life.

reviews.review_heading: This is my opinion about my college.
reviews.review_text: I initially joined this college because of the infrastructure and campus locality. The infrastructure is awesome, but there's no Wi-Fi available for students. The labs are also fine for me, and the classrooms are spacious with good air ventilation, in my opinion. The library is also good; we can borrow any book we want from there. reviews.review_heading: Absolutely dissatisfied because of the faculty but the college has good atmosphere and facilities.
reviews.review_text: My course is electronics and communication engineering which is quite good. The facilities are good having near classrooms. The labs are also good but some equipments are not available to observe things for practicals. We have a college canteen where the taste of the food is quite good. The college doesn't provide us the Wi-Fi password.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely amazing infrastructure and faculty.
reviews.review_text: This college has good infrastructure, and all the facilities are available for students. The quality of the facilities in your hostel depends on the fee you are paying. This college provides us with both non-AC and AC rooms. The food available in the mess is good.

reviews.review_heading: Obviously satisfied, but not completely.
reviews.review_text: Labs are better compared to other colleges. The infrastructure is not bad! And food is also not bad; the quality of food is good, but the quantity is less. Labs and classrooms are quite good, and the infrastructure also good; there are around 5 blocks on the college campus!

reviews.review_heading: This college has good natural surroundings.
reviews.review_text: There is no Wi-Fi in the college hostel. Hostel rooms and food are good. There is a big playground, and one cricket practice net and one basketball court are available. The hostel food is good. Medical services are somewhat available. The surroundings of this college are good.

reviews.review_heading: I am dissatisfied with faculty members, but the infrastructure is good.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is good. It has good facilities, but Wi-Fi is not available for students. It has a well-stocked library and classrooms. Classrooms are connected with projectors. The library has different types of books. We also have a canteen. It serves a variety of food items, drinks, etc. Other facilities, like medical facilities and sports facilities, are available.

reviews.review_heading: Not fit for placements.
reviews.review_text: There are two hostels for boys and girls. Moreover the classrooms are more. Labs and systems are more. And they provide access to the systems in any time. If the student need, they also conducts class tests and quiz events. Library is available and there wide range of books in that. Every one can access those in any time. They will encourage students for sports and games by conducting championships. And fests.

reviews.review_heading: Our college has good faculty members.
reviews.review_text: Our college provides good facilities for students. There are two hostels in our college. Our college provides a separate hostel and mess for boys and girls. There was a VIP cafeteria in our college. They provide a variety of food items at affordable prices. The canteen facility is available in the boys' hostel.

reviews.review_heading: Our college hostel and faculty members are good.
reviews.review_text: The college infrastructure was excellent. The hostel was good. The college hostel had excellent facilities. There were comfortable beds and clean washrooms. The food was good. There were basketball courts, cricket courts, and some other local games.

reviews.review_heading: Education and teachers are good, but placements are not for diplomas.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is very good in this college. The environmental condition is also very good to study. There is no traffic noise or pollution because this college is 5 kilometers away from the national highway.

reviews.review_heading: I am dissatisfied with faculty.
reviews.review_text: In our college, hostel rooms are good, Wi-Fi facilities are available and labs are varied. Food is very good in our hostel. Food is available in the mess and canteen, medical facilities, sports and games, etc. It has good infrastructure.

answer.text: If we look at the market demand, no doubt there is huge demand for BTech (Full Form: Bachelor of Technology) graduates among top recruiters who are constantly looking for skilled and knowledgeable students with fresh ideas to enhance their business growth and profitability.Having said that, a few previous-year employment reports published by the Business Standard and Times of India suggest that students found it a struggle to land a high-paying job after completing BTech because of a lack of industry-specific skills and knowledge and cut-throat competition between Lacs of engineering students hunting for a job.Hence, it is very important for students to focus on enhancing their skill set according to industrial demands and technological advancements, stay updated regarding all industry trends, build good networks and, most importantly, take up internships to gain experience and stand out in front of the employer.Read more: B Tech Jobs in India

faqs.question: Is there enough demand for BTech graduates in the job market?

answer.text: Graduates with a BTech degree in CSE are in high demand across a plethora of work fields, as everything is ruled by computer technology these days and every industry needs strong software applications, network security, and database management systems for effective working. review_summary.college_name: NRI Institute of Information Science and Technology Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: I am satisfied because it is value for money and the faculty members are very good-natured.

content.Placements: 90 percent of students got placed in my course. The highest salary package offered is 12 LPA, and the lowest salary package offered is 3 LPA. The top-most companies that visit our college are Wipro, TCS, etc. 75 percent of students got internships in my course in IT companies. There are enough roles, so we can go for it.
content.Infrastructure: Facilities are quite good. The only drawback is that attending classes is compulsory for everyone, or else strict action will be taken against us. There is a good infrastructure. There is a library, which is most important. Our college conducts so many fests and sports days.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: My college is very awesome to take admission and enjoy many things like events or faculty teaching.

content.Placements: The highest placement is that more than 75% of students are placed. Top companies are coming to the college, and many students intern and get job offers from various companies. More than a few students are hired by top companies. In my course, top offers rolled out for software engineers and backend roles.
content.Infrastructure: The facilities and infrastructure are the best on campus. The highest speed internet and smart classrooms, like biometric attendance, AC setup, or projectors, are available in my classroom. Many types of sports are played online or offline, the mess food is excellent, and the canteen is super.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Overall the college is quite decent and the academic faculty members are very good.

content.Placements: The college placements were overall average, with decent opportunities for students. The placement is average with a mix of decent and good opportunities. Overall placement support is not satisfactory. Most students get placed with decent jobs by the college.
content.Infrastructure: College infrastructure is very good with good facilities for the students. The course curriculum is good and covers the concepts well. Some subjects are useful, but a few feel useless. Overall, it provides a decent learning foundation by the faculty members in the college.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Information Technology - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Overall the college is quite decent and the academic faculty is very good.

content.Placements: The college placements were overall average, with decent opportunity for students. The placements are average with a mix of decent and moderate opportunity. Overall placement support is not satisfactory. Most students get placed with decent jobs by the college.
content.Infrastructure: College infrastructure is very good, providing facilities for the students. The course curriculum is good and covers the concepts well. Some subjects are useful but a few feel outdated. Overall, it provides a decent learning foundation by the faculty members in the college.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Outdated curriculum poor facilities and weak placement support – not recommended.

content.Placements: Placements: Very poor only 0-5 percent students placed. Overall not recommended for students expecting quality placements or industry exposure. Roles offered: Mostly BPO or support roles not relevant to our core field. Overall not recommended for students expecting quality placements or industry exposure.
content.Infrastructure: Department facilities: The labs were outdated and many systems didn’t work properly. WiFi was slow and often unavailable. Classrooms lacked smart boards and were poorly maintained. The library had limited books and outdated material. Hostel & mess: Hostel rooms were congested with poor cleanliness. Washrooms were often dirty. Food in the mess was tasteless repetitive and sometimes unhygienic. Canteen options were very limited.

reviews.review_text: College infrastructure is very good, providing facilities for the students. The course curriculum is good and covers the concepts well. Some subjects are useful but a few feel outdated. Overall, it provides a decent learning foundation by the faculty members in the college.

reviews.review_heading: Outdated curriculum poor facilities  and weak placement support – not recommended.
reviews.review_text: Department facilities: The labs were outdated and many systems didn’t work properly. WiFi was slow and often unavailable. Classrooms lacked smart boards and were poorly maintained. The library had limited books and outdated material. Hostel & mess: Hostel rooms were congested with poor cleanliness. Washrooms were often dirty. Food in the mess was tasteless repetitive and sometimes unhygienic. Canteen options were very limited.

reviews.review_heading: Good placement and supportive faculty, with scope for curriculum improvement.
reviews.review_text: Our department has well-equipped computer labs with the latest systems and the highest speed Wi-Fi connectivity available throughout the academic block. Classrooms are spacious, have projectors and smart boards, making lectures more interactive. The central library is well stocked with a variety of technical books and journals.

reviews.review_heading: Faculty members are currently ruling in college.
reviews.review_text: The college is very good on the basis of some qualities but lacks a lot. Wi-Fi is only available in labs, and the network is not good in the classrooms. Toilets are very hygienic. Classrooms are clean and good. Labs are advanced for only some subjects. The library has only study material, with no novels or other books. Faculty members are very good, friendly, and hardworking, but some teachers are rude and have professional behavior.

reviews.review_heading: My short summary of college.
reviews.review_text: Not luxury, but Sunday food items are available at our canteen. There's a huge hall at the canteen, and almost 200 students can sit at the same time and relish the food. The next big thing would be the Amphitheatre, as it is small but always buzzing. Among everything, the college has taken complete care in providing us with a stationery shop right inside the campus. So, all bases covered, and for our basic needs during college hours, we don't have to step beyond the campus gate.

reviews.review_heading: Best budget engineering college in Bhopal .
reviews.review_text: The facilities provided by the college are good, the building for all departments of engineering are in goof condition. Each building includes labs, Wi-Fi, classrooms and library. They also provide hostel which is overall good. The only problem is food, which is not good at all.

reviews.review_heading: NRI institute of technology is a good institute for placement.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure and campus are developed and have very modern facilities. Electronic labs are there with all the available equipment. But the labs have been closed since 8 p.m. The hostel and canteen are there near the institute. The institute offers a bus facility for students. Sport activities will be held every weekend.

reviews.review_heading: My college life is very nice .
reviews.review_text: The college is very nice and building is good. All labs are Wi-Fi enabled. We have an IBM lab and Advanced engineering labs. A college library is there with around 45.000 books of the latest edition. All the books are helpful. Classrooms are smart with projectors.

reviews.review_heading: NRI has high quality infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is very well have a very good computer Science labs. Electronic machines is available in labs for practical work. Industry tour provided in every month after passing 3 year. Wi-Fi, labs, library is very good. Canteen food quality is extraordinary. Hostel is some walk away from institution. Sport facility is advanced, some coach is state level coach they provide a top quality training.

reviews.review_heading: The best college in Bhopal with great infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: The labs and overall infrastructure are top-notch. Regular labs are taken by faculty members, and coding practices also help students form their development rapidly in their domain field. Our college also encourages students to do extra work on tools and new upcoming technologies.

reviews.review_heading: It is a good college but placement opportunities are not provided.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is good. Hostels are not good and they don't serve good food. Our college charges less fees but is not a good college for studies. Facilities provided in our college are very good.

reviews.review_heading: It is a good college for financially middle-class students.
reviews.review_text: Facilities provided by our campus are not good but also not bad. There are many buildings for different branches. For civil and mechanical branches, there is a separate building which consists of workshops and many laboratories.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech in Computer Science & Engineering (Networks) - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: College has good teachers.

content.Placements: 10% of students get placement every year. The highest package is 8 lacs, and the lowest package is 2 lacs per annum. At these colleges, there is no internship. The college is good but the facilities are not good. The faculty is very good because all are BPSC-qualified.
content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi is very slow, and the lab quality is good. The classroom is very good and the library is of good quality. The academy building is good and the hostel is also good. Here are two boys hostels and one girl's hostel. But management is not always good.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Civil Engineering - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: It is a very good college in Bihar.

content.Placements: Around 60% of the students get placed in our college. All the companies around visit the campus and select students. Internships are provided by our college in companies like Tata Steel, Cisco, etc., visit our college for placements. All courses offered in our college are good. Overall it provides good placements and is improving.
content.Infrastructure: Facilities and infrastructure of the college are very good. Wi-Fi facilities are available 24X7 on our campus. Hostel, mess and medical facilities are also good. Sports and games facilities are also available in our college. Overall facilities and infrastructure are good.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Civil Engineering - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Our college has the best teachers support.

content.Placements: Our college the highest package offered for students are 7 Lacs and the lowest package are 2 Lacs and average package 4.5 Lacs The top recruiting company tata motors Our college all students got internship very necessary and all students are got internship from the nearest road construction department company .
content.Infrastructure: Our college mess and canteen are fully clean and healthy, and the best food is provided at a moderate cost. Our college labs and classrooms are properly maintained. Our college library is very nice, and all types of books are provided and well-stocked.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech in Computer Science & Engineering (Networks) - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Our college has good infrastructure.

content.Placements: Almost 70% of students got placed in our college with a salary package of 1 LPA - 10 LPA. The highest salary package offered is 10 LPA. Top recruiting companies are Wipro, HCL, Cisco, etc. Many students got internships in many reputed companies and universities like IIT Roorkee. Many companies visit our college to recruit students.
content.Infrastructure: It is a new college. Almost all things are available in our college. A few things are not available in our college. Boys' and girls' hostels are situated on campus. Our college has a faculty quarter and a principal quarter. Wi-Fi facility is available in our college and hostel. The library is available in our college. We have a lecture hall. Around 60 students can accommodate in a lecture hall. They conduct classes regularly with digital attendance. Our college has many labs. We have a language lab. The mess facility is available in the hostel. We have a canteen. Our college provides us with facilities for sports like cricket, volleyball, etc.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Electrical Engineering - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: You can take admission here to gain better knowledge.

content.Placements: It is a new college, and it is our first batch. So I expect more than 70% of the students can be placed from our college. The average salary package offered in other colleges related to this college which are also affiliated with AKU is 6-7 LPA.
content.Infrastructure: Facilities and infrastructure are good, and it has a very big campus, infrastructure and well-finished. The hostel is also in our college, and it is very good. High-speed Wi-Fi is available on the whole campus, and digital classrooms are also available in our college.

college_info.intro: Assam Science and Technology University (ASTU) offers a variety of courses at undergraduate, postgraduate, and doctoral level, along with, diploma courses. ASTU popular programmes include, B.Sc, B.Tech, B.Pharma, BCA, among others.

fees_and_eligibility.overview: Assam Science and Technology University offers programmes across streams such as Science, Management, Pharmacy, Architecture, and others. Admission to all courses isobtained in the qualifying exam or the course-specific exams (JEE Main/ Assam CEE/ GATE). Candidates must check the eligibility and fee as per their desired course on the official website before applying. The frequency of ASTU fees can be different from course to course. The common payable components for every course at ASTU are Tuition Fees, Registration Fees, Examination Fees, etc. Find below the course-wise fee details and eligibility criteria at Assam Science and Technology University:

faqs.answer: A:    Assam Science and Technology University eligibility criteria require students to complete the last qualifying exam. The minimum aggregate also varies depending on the course and specialisation. In addition, students are advised to also go through the selection criteria of the offered course before applying as admissions are mainly entrance-based. Students can check the following points to know about the ASTU eligibility criteria:ASTU UG admission requires students to pass Class 12 or equivalent from a recognised boardASTU PG admission requires students to complete graduation in a relevant field from a recognised universityFor ASTU PhD admission, students must complete postgraduation in a relevant field along with having the specified experience/ certifications

faqs.question: Q: What are the courses offered at Assam Science and Technology University?

faqs.answer: To get admission at Assam Science and Technology University, students need to go through a multi-step admission process. Eligible students can apply online at the official website of the university. Students need to firstly apply for the entrance exam conducted by the concerned body as admissions are mainly entrance-based. Applicants are then shortlisted based on their scores obtained in national or state-level tests. Some of the entrance exams accepted by the university include JEE Mains, Assam CEE, NATA, GATE, etc. Seat allotment is done through counselling. Those who make it to the final merit list are then required to go through document verification and pay ASTU admission fees to confirm their seats.
faqs.question: Q: How can I get admission at Assam Science and Technology University?

faqs.answer: Assam Science and Technology University mainly admits students based on their academic performance. Students seeking to join the university need to satisfy both the minimum educatioanl qualifications and selection rounds to get a seat. Securing 75% in Class 12 may satisfy the basic eligibility of the course if there are no other criteria, such as compulsory subjects. However, for most courses, students need to have studied certain subjects and secured a minimum aggregate of 45-50%. Hence, just getting 75% in Class 12 won't guarantee a seat at ASTU for the undergraduate courses. For more information about ASTU admission chances, students can connect with the university's help desk.
faqs.question: Q: Can I get into Assam Science and Technology University with 75% in Class 12?

faqs.answer: To get a seat at Assam Science and Technology University, students need to satisfy the admission criteria of the offered courses. The university mainly accepts students on an entrance basis for most the courses. Hence, interested students are advised to go through the admission prospectus of the university. Those who meet the admission requirments can proceed with the admission process by filling out the application form and appearing for the required exam. To get a seat, students need to participate in the counselling process. Once an admission offer is made, selected students need to go through document verification and pay the admission fees to secure their spots at the university.
