content.Placements: Placements at NERIM need a lot of improvement. The overall placement support and opportunities provided by the college are not up to the mark and many students expect better industry connections. The college needs to bring more companies for recruitment drives and should focus on providing relevant job opportunities in the core fields of the courses offered. The campus also has medical aid, a small gym, and sports facilities like basketball and badminton, allowing students to refresh during free time.

admission_overview.title: Assam Science and Technology University Admission Overview 2025
admission_overview.description: Assam Science and Technology University admission 2025 is a blend of merit and entrance basis depending on the programme. For certain courses, students are selected on an entrance basis, whereas, merit obtained in the last qualifying exam is considered for other programmes. The university offers a wide range of programmes at the undergraduste and postgraduate levels. These programmes are offered across fields, such as Science, Technology, Commerce, Management, Architecture, and more. Students can enrol into the course of choice by registering themselves for the desired programme. The university accepts valid score obtained in national and state-level entrance tests followed by counselling for seat allotment (if applicable). Also known as ASTU, the university accepts online applications and offers programmes via its various affliated colleges and institutes. Students interested in joining the university can read the following article to learn all about the admission criteria, procedure, and other latest details surrounding ASTU.

faqs.question: How can I get admission at Assam Science and Technology University?
faqs.answer: To get admission at Assam Science and Technology University, students need to go through a multi-step admission process. Eligible students can apply online at the official website of the university. Students need to firstly apply for the entrance exam conducted by the concerned body as admissions are mainly entrance-based. Applicants are then shortlisted based on their scores obtained in national or state-level tests. Some of the entrance exams accepted by the university include JEE Mains, Assam CEE, NATA, GATE, etc. Seat allotment is done through counselling. Those who make it to the final merit list are then required to go through document verification and payASTU admission feesto confirm their seats.

faqs.question: Can I get into Assam Science and Technology University with 75% in Class 12?
faqs.answer: Assam Science and Technology University mainly admits students based on their academic performance. Students seeking to join the university need to satisfy both the minimum educatioanl qualifications and selection rounds to get a seat. Securing 75% in Class 12 may satisfy the basic eligibility of the course if there are no other criteria, such as compulsory subjects. However, for most courses, students need to have studied certain subjects and secured a minimum aggregate of 45-50%. Hence, just getting 75% in Class 12 won't guarantee a seat at ASTU for the undergraduate courses. For more information aboutASTU admission chances, students can connect with the university's help desk.

reviews.review_heading: Value for money could simply get a certificate, and the infrastructure is pretty basic, etc.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the campus is pretty average. The classrooms are good but not that great. The main problem is the lack of sports and arts facilities. There is no proper ground for sports and other activities. Labs and libraries are present.

reviews.review_heading: I am not satisfied with this college.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is not good. There is no Wi-Fi facility. Our classrooms are clean. Laboratory is well-equipped. It also provides a decent library, and several books are available. Hostel facilities are not good. The food served in the canteen is average. Playground is not good, so there are no sports or games.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely satisfied with college life, teachers, and placement.
reviews.review_text: Th college has well-equipped labs for every branch. There is a library inside the campus with several books, journals, and magazines. The college has three buildings for the six branches. For CSE, there are four computer labs with not less than 30 computers. There is hostel facility for boys and girls within the campus itself. Classrooms are quite large with a blackboard and can accommodate at least 60 students.

reviews.review_heading: I have a balanced CSE experience with scope for improvement.
reviews.review_text: The CSE labs have basic systems and a table [Wi-Fi/LAN]. Classrooms are decent, and the library has enough outdated books. Hostel rooms are good, and the mess food is normal. Canteen and medical facilities are available. Don't think about sports here. Overall, the infrastructure is passable.

reviews_list.review_title: The college, infrastructure, and hostel are good.

review_content.Placements: Some companies come to the campus for the placements. In my senior batch, no interviews are going on. While we were studying, only campus interviews held. Some of my friends told that they don't get a call from the company. After finishing the college, there are no calls and emails from the corresponding company.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of the college is good, but there is no Wi-Fi facility. When I was leaving the college, I could see some importance given to sports. We have only one big ground in our college. In our college, we participate in all kind of sports activities like bodybuilding and carrom.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.E. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2017
reviews_list.review_title: It is a right choice for your academics.

review_content.Placements: About 50% of the students got placed in the previous batch. In our batch, 70% of the students are placed. The highest salary package is 4 LPA, and the average is 2 LPA-3 LPA. Many startups visited our campus. Amazon is the only company which visited our campus. Trainees, technical consultants and associate software engineering roles were offered.
review_content.Infrastructure: The atmosphere in the college is looking good with crotons, green trees and plants. The Wi-Fi facility is available in the college and labs are air-conditioned with the huge number of systems. Games and NCC are provided and are the best. The hostel rooms are available with all necessary facilities. Good and tasty foods are available in the canteen.

review_summary.college_name: Sriram Engineering College Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Absolutely satisfied because of faculty and good placements in 2023.

content.Placements: Very few students are placed in our college. Their packages are also low. No, it doesn't tie up with recruiting companies on our campus. The lowest percentage of students got internships for our course and at good companies. I didn't expect a top role offer from the placement.
content.Infrastructure: Labs benefit from better infrastructure and development. I didn't expect Wi-Fi facilities. Classrooms are also better. The library has a poor book collection at our college. Hostels are also far from the campus. The canteen has average food and medical facilities available and sports aren't important on our campus .

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: Dissatisfaction is due to faculty members.

content.Placements: As there are good placement opportunities available in our college, other college students can also visit our college campus for off-campus drives often. Top recruiting companies from our college were TCS, HCL, L&T, EY, and Deloitte. Our college also provides internship opportunities to students.
content.Infrastructure: The overall infrastructure of our college is superb, and it is maintained properly. Maximum staff members and helpers are working in this college. There is a variety of food available in our college canteen and hostel mess. Also, they collect fees for medical insurance yearly.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2016
individual_reviews.title: The college, infrastructure, and hostel are good.

content.Placements: Some companies come to the campus for the placements. In my senior batch, no interviews are going on. While we were studying, only campus interviews held. Some of my friends told that they don't get a call from the company. After finishing the college, there are no calls and emails from the corresponding company.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of the college is good, but there is no Wi-Fi facility. When I was leaving the college, I could see some importance given to sports. We have only one big ground in our college. In our college, we participate in all kind of sports activities like bodybuilding and carrom.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2017
individual_reviews.title: It is a right choice for your academics.

content.Placements: About 50% of the students got placed in the previous batch. In our batch, 70% of the students are placed. The highest salary package is 4 LPA, and the average is 2 LPA-3 LPA. Many startups visited our campus. Amazon is the only company which visited our campus. Trainees, technical consultants and associate software engineering roles were offered.
content.Infrastructure: The atmosphere in the college is looking good with crotons, green trees and plants. The Wi-Fi facility is available in the college and labs are air-conditioned with the huge number of systems. Games and NCC are provided and are the best. The hostel rooms are available with all necessary facilities. Good and tasty foods are available in the canteen.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Chemical Engineering - Batch of 2018
individual_reviews.title: Dissatisfied with the faculty members.

content.Placements: Very few core companies are coming for placements, and others are non-core companies. My senior got placed in BPO company, and some of them got placed in non-core companies. For our batch, the company related to chemical engineering has come and very less has placed.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is average. It is not a well-maintained campus. There is no space for the playground, and no games are encouraged. No Wi-Fi is available on the campus. The labs are old, and classrooms are somewhat good. There are no medical facilities, and hostel rooms are good. The security systems are not well-maintained.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning - Batch of 2026
reviews_list.review_title: Great infrastructure and facilities, average faculty, but strong placement support in recent years.

review_content.Placements: Around 75%-80% of students got placed from the CSE branch. The highest Package is around 10 LPA (off-campus by product-based companies) the lowest package is around 3.5 LPA and the average package is around 4.5 LPA-5 LPA. Top recruiting companies TCS, Infosys, Wipro, Capgemini, Cognizant, Accenture, HCL, Zensar, LTI, and a few product-based startups.
review_content.Infrastructure: The library is well-maintained, quiet, and has a good collection of books and online resources for all departments. Labs are mixed in quality some labs have very fast and well-maintained systems, which are great for coding and practical work. However, a few other labs still have non-working or outdated systems, and in some, the computers are not even operating. So lab experience can vary depending on the lab allotted. Hostel rooms are decent and maintained regularly. The mess food is average, not bad but gets repetitive. The canteen offers more variety and is preferred by most students.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering (Data Science) - Batch of 2025
reviews_list.review_title: Review of Lakshmi Narain College of Technology Excellence.

review_content.Placements: College offers various placement opportunities mainly mass recruiters come and offer bulk placements. The average package is 3.5 LPA, and the highest salary is 12 LPA. No internship opportunities are provided by the college. Almost 60% of students get placed in mostly marketing and sales.
review_content.Infrastructure: College campus is situated on 50 acres of land. The excellence building is quite large. It contains all the essential labs and seminar halls. College has no Wi-Fi facility for students and even the mobile network gets worse there. There is a central library in the college. It contains all the essential books. I have not opted for college hostel. But still, girls out there told me that college mess is worse.

individual_reviews.title: This college is the best private engineering college in Madhya Pradesh.

content.Placements: In this college, the percentage of the placed students is more than 70%. The highest package of this college campus is 1.12 crore per annum. The average package of this college is 4 LPA. To get internships the percentage is required more than 75% in the top IT companies.
content.Infrastructure: The facilities of this college are best as compared to another private college. The structure of classrooms in this college is like IIT colleges. Every classroom has a projector for studying. In every lab and library Wi-Fi facilities are available. AC and fan facilities are also available.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Great infrastructure and facilities, average faculty, but strong placement support in recent years.

content.Placements: Around 75%-80% of students got placed from the CSE branch. The highest Package is around 10 LPA (off-campus by product-based companies) the lowest package is around 3.5 LPA and the average package is around 4.5 LPA-5 LPA. Top recruiting companies TCS, Infosys, Wipro, Capgemini, Cognizant, Accenture, HCL, Zensar, LTI, and a few product-based startups.
content.Infrastructure: The library is well-maintained, quiet, and has a good collection of books and online resources for all departments. Labs are mixed in quality some labs have very fast and well-maintained systems, which are great for coding and practical work. However, a few other labs still have non-working or outdated systems, and in some, the computers are not even operating. So lab experience can vary depending on the lab allotted. Hostel rooms are decent and maintained regularly. The mess food is average, not bad but gets repetitive. The canteen offers more variety and is preferred by most students.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering (Data Science) - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Review of Lakshmi Narain College of Technology Excellence.

content.Placements: College offers various placement opportunities mainly mass recruiters come and offer bulk placements. The average package is 3.5 LPA, and the highest salary is 12 LPA. No internship opportunities are provided by the college. Almost 60% of students get placed in mostly marketing and sales.
content.Infrastructure: College campus is situated on 50 acres of land. The excellence building is quite large. It contains all the essential labs and seminar halls. College has no Wi-Fi facility for students and even the mobile network gets worse there. There is a central library in the college. It contains all the essential books. I have not opted for college hostel. But still, girls out there told me that college mess is worse.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering (Data Science) - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: LNCT excellence honest review.

content.Placements: There will be a lot of companies but remember there will be a lot of students from the whole LNCT Group. Accenture, Capgemini, TCS, EPAM, Delloite, Infosys, Cognizant, Wipro, and 30-35 more companies come here. The process consists of online MCQ tests followed by interviews, GDs, and communication rounds.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is good. Teachers are qualified. Labs and systems are also in working conditions. There is Wi-Fi on all floors. The hostel is expensive though with full facilities. Fests and events are organised on time. College NCC is very active. College has all sports facilities and also go for state and nodals.

reviews.review_heading: The infrastructure of this college is very good. Teachers have a lot of knowledge.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of this college is very good. Labs, classrooms, and the library are also good. All subject books are available in the library. The canteen is also good. Sports also happen here. Medical facilities are available. Hostel facilities are good.

reviews.review_heading: College Chronicles: The Real Student Experience.
reviews.review_text: We have got library facilities from the library in our college, and we have got a book bank in the library due to which we do not have to buy books, and we can perform practicals in labs whenever we want, and we have free labs so that this helps us in further studies. It helps a lot and teaches us practically a lot of things, and in many of our labs, even in our 100 labs, there will be more than a thousand computers there in our college, and everything is taught practically or theoretically. And...

reviews.review_heading: Overall, everything is good here.
reviews.review_text: Classrooms and labs are well-maintained. Wi-Fi speed is high. Hostel facilities are good. After the first year, boys won't get a hostel. Overall, the food quality in the mess is well and good. Sports facilities are also good. The food quality in the canteen is also good.

reviews.review_heading: I am so related to being part of this college.
reviews.review_text: Classrooms are well-designed. They have digital screens for teaching. There are comfortable seats. The quality of the food is delicious. All canteens are neat. If anyone gets injured, there is a big medical room in our college. Our college has a big cricket playground.

reviews.review_heading: My college gives me the trust that I have a chance to have a great future.
reviews.review_text: We have all types of facilities provided by a tier 1 college. We have 3 libraries, various labs, and classrooms that are good enough. There are 3-4 canteens on campus. We also have sports events like the Olympic, where we have inter-college competitions in sports like cricket, volleyball, and more.

reviews.review_heading: Faculty is good, placements cell should improve there performance.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure at this college is quite good. Almost all the facilities are good, and the faculty are okay. The hostel is amazing, and it has all the amenities you could ask for. The only downside is that the mess food is not great, but it is tolerable. The college has three libraries, a canteen, medical facilities, and wifi in the labs.

reviews.review_heading: College improvement is clear as I spend the whole day in college.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is very good in our college. Classrooms and labs are well-maintained and structured. Sports facilities are provided. College management is strict about campus rules. Management offers any kind of help to students for their good performance in both extracurricular activities and academics. For me, it was the best college I could get. I have made plenty of memories that will long last.

reviews.review_heading: Faculty is good and infrastructure is not that good.
reviews.review_text: There are labs for all courses with ample seating capacity. Wi-Fi is available only for college systems, but you get Wi-Fi in the hostels. The food is good, and the college has its own hospital, so medical facilities are excellent.

reviews.review_heading: It's an average college, and placements are average.
reviews.review_text: The campus of LNCT is big enough. Labs and classrooms are average because sometimes it feels cramped. The faculty is good and very strict; it's like a very big school. The food in the canteen is not that good; I haven't eaten much canteen food because I was not in the hostel.

faqs.question: Q: How many seats are available at RVS Technical campus for all courses combined?

faqs.answer: RVS Technical campus has below criteria for taking admissions to it's various courses: CoursesEligibilityB.E. / B.TechCandidate must have passed VIII, IX, X, XI & XII Std. from schools situated in Tamil Nadu. Tamil Nadu native candidate who have passed any of the VIII, IX, X, XI & XII Std. or their equivalent exam from schools situated outside Tamil Nadu can also apply. They should produce Original Nativity Certificate. Children of Central Government Employees, irrespective of their nativity, provided their parents or guardians (only if both parents are not alive) have been serving in Tamil Nadu continuously for the past five years can be eligible to apply. Sons & daughters of All India service Tamil Nadu cadre officers are eligible to apply. A Self declaration from the parent in this regard is to be produced. Children of employees in the Public Sector or Government recognised institutions had been working in their organisations for the past five years are also eligible, irrespective of their domicile. Other State candidates who have studied VIII, IX, X, XI and XII Std. in Tamil Nadu are eligible to apply.M.E./M.TechCandidate who have completed 10+2+AMIE or 10+3 years Diploma + AMIE are also eligible. AMIE candidate must have 2 years regular full time experience in the relevant field.

faqs.question: How can I get into RVS Technical campus for UG/PG courses? Am I eligible for admission?
faqs.answer:
RVS Technical campus has below criteria for taking admissions to it's various courses:CoursesEligibilityB.E. / B.TechCandidate must have passed VIII, IX, X, XI & XII Std. from schools situated in Tamil Nadu.
Tamil Nadu native candidate who have passed any of the VIII, IX, X, XI & XII Std. or their equivalent exam from schools situated outside Tamil Nadu can also apply. They should produce Original Nativity Certificate.
Children of Central Government Employees, irrespective of their nativity, provided their parents or guardians (only if both parents are not alive) have been serving in Tamil Nadu continuously for the past five years can be eligible to apply.
Sons & daughters of All India service Tamil Nadu cadre officers are eligible to apply. A Self declaration from the parent in this regard is to be produced.
Children of employees in the Public Sector or Government recognised institutions had been working in their organisations for the past five years are also eligible, irrespective of

Class room  cleanliness is very good. Labs are also very good, Wi-Fi is poor, they give only 36 MBPS for us.
Hostel is not bad nor good. 
The quality of Hostel room is low condition with the required fees.
The mess is also average for the fees in the hostel.

reviews.review_heading: Good college and placements.
reviews.review_text: The hostel room is very neat and clean. Toilets and bathrooms are neat and clean. There are more than 300 rooms in our hostel, and gym is also available in the hostel. The food is also awesome, weekly 2 times non-vegetarian food is provided, and morning breakfast is healthy to eat.

reviews.review_heading: Good infrastructure and faculty, but room for improvement in placements and hostel facilities.
reviews.review_text: RVS Technical Campus offers well-equipped labs and classrooms, a library with good resources, hostels with study halls, and recreational facilities. Sports facilities and medical care are available. A canteen and Wi-Fi connectivity on campus. Well-equipped systems.

hostel.description: Separate hostels for boys and girls

reviews.review_heading: All information about my college .
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of my college is decent, not bad, not good. Proper labs are present for all the students, and Wi-Fi facilities are also good. A library is present, and we have a proper period for the library. There is no hostel for the students, and students live in rented rooms.

reviews.review_heading: Good engineering college with good infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: The institute offers good facilities and the campus is Wi-Fi enabled. The computers in the computer labs are in working condition and the lab is well-cleaned and maintained. The canteen offers a variety of good quality and hygienic food. The institute organises various sports and cultural programs.

reviews.review_heading: No placement drives were actually worthy.
reviews.review_text: Hostel facilities are provided only to lower-category students, and for other categories, there are no facilities. There are no additional facilities for anyone provided by them. You can stay in nearby hostels, as they vary differently, or there are rooms available in that area.

reviews.review_heading: A good college with the best facilities.
reviews.review_text: The Takshshila Institute of Engineering and Technology has good facilities; Wi-Fi is always available on the college campus, the computer labs are good, and the food provided in the college canteen is hygienic and of good quality. A variety of food is available in the college, and sports activities and cultural events are organized.

reviews.review_heading: The best college in Jabalpur I have ever found.
reviews.review_text: My college was very adorable. The facilities of the college were very good, coming to the Wi-Fi facility, it was just too good; they provided Wi-Fi passwords to every student. In this college, canteen, mess, hostel, all the facilities were there. During February, they conduct an annual function.

reviews.review_heading: Our college has excellent teachers with teaching skills.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms, and library are available with good facilities. Good quality food is available in the canteen with various types of food. Medical facilities, sports, and games are available.

reviews.review_heading: Our college and our branch are always good.
reviews.review_text: Our college has mostly the best infrastructure in Jabalpur ITTECH. The canteen, medical facilities and hostel are very good.

reviews.review_heading: Every student wants placements, but this college does not provide any placements.
reviews.review_text: All facilities are available in our college like labs, classrooms, library, cool water, Wi-Fi, furniture and everything. There is no hostel in our college. However, there are a canteen, sports, games and medical kit. The quality of the food served in the canteen is good.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied with the studies, but I am disappointed with placements.
reviews.review_text: Classrooms were good, large and had the capacity of 80-90 seats, and they are equipped with large green boards, fans, ducts and good furniture. The college building was very good and attractive. Small gardens were built inside, and there was a big garden outside. The library was big, and many books were available for the syllabus. The library also had computers with internet for the use of students. The canteen was very good. Samosa, idli, Alu bada, cold drinks, chips, biscuits, tea, coffee, Dos...

reviews.review_heading: Overall, our college is average, and the campus atmosphere is also good.
reviews.review_text: Facilities provided by our college for the course are good because everything is related to the course like classrooms, libraries and labs. In the canteen, the quality of the food served is good and less costly. Sports and games are played here for enjoyment and fitness. Hostel facilities are not available.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely satisfied because of the faculty members and good infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college was good. Labs, classrooms and washrooms were clean. The college provides comfortable girls' common room, garden and canteen. Quality of food served in the canteen was good. The library was also good, and all the books were available.

reviews.review_heading: This college is awesome, and there are good facilities.
reviews.review_text: We have very good classrooms, library and many facilities for games and sports. The quality of food offered is good. Many varieties of food are available for us. Stage classrooms are also very well maintained, and we had good labs. Even the ground and garden area are very well maintained.

reviews.review_heading: This is good than any other colleges.
reviews.review_text: My college has a beautiful and well-designed infrastructure. My college have three floors. In the first floor, there is a civil department, the labs like a fluid mechanics lab, SOM lab, workshop, smithy's lab, and the management and fee counter is also there in this front. In the 2nd-floor, there is a CS and EC department. In the 3rd-floor, there is a mechanical department, ex-department, ed hall, and mechanical labs.

reviews.review_heading: The college is located at the heart of the city, healthy for the students.
reviews.review_text: There is a very good infrastructure. The college is located in the center of the city, and it is very close to the main road near Sharda chowk. There is greenery in the environment, and no sound pollution and distractions because of the traffic. The campus is good in comparison to the other colleges. There are Wi-Fi classrooms, and sports and games are organized every year.

reviews.review_heading: I was very disappointed with the campus placements in 2016.
reviews.review_text: The facilities were excellent. Wi-Fi was not available for students. The library was good. Benches and seating facilities were excellent, no doubt. Labs were not too hi-tech but were okay. Only one special and unique facility my college had was the presence of its own NCC unit in the campus which no other college has.

data.description: Yes, the BTech Mechanical Engineering syllabus incorporates both hands-on lab work and intriguing workshops to give a rigorous practical experience to the students pursuing the course so that they are well informed of all the basic concepts of industrial applications, along with theory-based learning in the classroom setting. This further leads to better career prospects and earning opportunities in the future.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Civil Engineering - Batch of 2021
reviews_list.review_title: I don't suggest joining this college.

review_content.Placements: None of the students got placed. Companies do not come to the college. Our college students are doing jobs on their own or are doing their own business. Our university syllabus is outdated as compared to other universities in Maharashtra.
review_content.Infrastructure: Not many facilities are available for students. Students pay for all facilities, but they are not provided by the college. Students pay for Wi-Fi and labs, but Wi-Fi is not available for students. A canteen is not available. Medical facilities are not available.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech in Mechanical and Mechatronics Engineering (Additive Manufacturing) - Batch of 2025
reviews_list.review_title: There are moderate placement in companies.

review_content.Placements: In our college, at least 40 to 60 percent of students are placed. College placement is good and the best. The highest package of the college is 4.50 LPA, and the average package is 1 LPA. The mechanical course is good in our college. Tata Motors, Wipro, Cummins India.
review_content.Infrastructure: Facilities are average, like Wi-Fi in all college classes, but the speed is moderate. Labs are clean, and libraries are also clean. This college is the best in this area, but it is far outside Gadhinglaj city. My college campus is average. No such big campus.

individual_reviews.title: The college is good. Faculty members are friendly with students and I am satisfied.

content.Placements: The placement of our college is not so good it should be improved. For computer science engineering some 2 companies will be visiting and for the rest of the departments. The quality of on-campus placements is not good. It should be improved, and they provide internships too.
content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure is better, like it consists of good classrooms with sunlight and air. Also has a canteen which is good and has purified water. It has labs that consist of all the working PC's. Also has library which consists of books related to the syllabus and novels too.

individual_reviews.title: Tontadarya College of Engineering is the best college. We have a very big campus.

content.Infrastructure: Our college had hostel and it's facilities were very good. The food in canteen was also very good. The quantity of food was also awesome, we could eat as much as we wanted. They gave minimum 3 varieties of vegetables. We also played sports. Medical facilities and library were also very good. The librarian was the sweetest.

reviews_list.review_title: Completely dissatisfied with the college.

review_content.Placements: It is an average college. The average placement rate is about 40%. Students get placed in local industries, and about 1% of students are placed in big industries. The college isn't value for money. It is a total waste of money in this college. It is an average college for average students.
review_content.Infrastructure: The course and hostel infrastructure are average. Wi-Fi is not available for students, and the food available in the mess and canteen is average and of poor quality. The behaviour of staff and faculty is also not good. Bus facilities and medical facilities are also not good in this college.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.E. in Electrical and Electronics Engineering - Batch of 2015
reviews_list.review_title: I had a very good experience in some aspects and a very bad experience in some aspects.

review_content.Placements: Our college is not good for placements as only a few students get selected. Very low salary packages are offered here. They tell you that they provide only very good placements, but placements are very low. Even they charge placement free. Sometimes if you get selected also, they do not give you a joining letter. So, there are below-average placements here.
review_content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi facility is available only for browsing. Classrooms are good, and the library is also available here with a book bank facility. There are labs here, but there are no good teachers for practicals. However, sports facilities are very good, and many sports competitions are organised by our college. Inter-college sports competitions are organised. There is also a canteen here, and the medical facilities are very good.

review_summary.college_name: RKDF Institute of Science and Technology (RKDFIST) Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2017
individual_reviews.title: Nice college and a bright future.

content.Placements: The placement process is very easy for students when MNCs and IT companies visit the campus. College placement is good, and 25 percent of students are placed at this college. Names of companies that visited this college, like Jio, Wipro, Tata, HCL, etc. And other respective companies also visit.
content.Infrastructure: The good facilities in these college- classrooms are clean, fully air-conditioned, and have proper ventilation. I am discolored, so I do not know about hostels, but my friends leave a hostel some time discussing the hostel facilities of my friends, and he says they are good.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2018
individual_reviews.title: The best college in Bhopal.

content.Placements: 1. About 70% of students were placed on campus by my college. 2. Roles like quality, maintenance, production, and office work are offered. 3. About 85% of students got internships from my college. 4. Various companies will come in the final year. So give your best and get placed.
content.Infrastructure: All facilities are available in my college like labs, Wi-Fi, classes, hostels, canteens, etc. The quality of the hostel is good and the food is different every day, so good food is provided by them and during events, they play games with all the students. It is a good college.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2021
individual_reviews.title: Completely dissatisfied with the college.

content.Placements: It is an average college. The average placement rate is about 40%. Students get placed in local industries, and about 1% of students are placed in big industries. The college isn't value for money. It is a total waste of money in this college. It is an average college for average students.
content.Infrastructure: The course and hostel infrastructure are average. Wi-Fi is not available for students, and the food available in the mess and canteen is average and of poor quality. The behaviour of staff and faculty is also not good. Bus facilities and medical facilities are also not good in this college.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Electrical and Electronics Engineering - Batch of 2015
individual_reviews.title: I had a very good experience in some aspects and a very bad experience in some aspects.

content.Placements: Our college is not good for placements as only a few students get selected. Very low salary packages are offered here. They tell you that they provide only very good placements, but placements are very low. Even they charge placement free. Sometimes if you get selected also, they do not give you a joining letter. So, there are below-average placements here.
content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi facility is available only for browsing. Classrooms are good, and the library is also available here with a book bank facility. There are labs here, but there are no good teachers for practicals. However, sports facilities are very good, and many sports competitions are organised by our college. Inter-college sports competitions are organised. There is also a canteen here, and the medical facilities are very good.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2019
individual_reviews.title: Review of RKDF Institute of Science and Technology (RKDFIST).

content.Placements: Almost 70% of the students got placed. The highest salary package offered is 16 LPA, the average salary package offered is 5-6 LPA and the lowest salary package offered is 2.5 LPA. Top recruiting companies of our college are Wipro, Hitachi, Capgemini, Concentrix, Infosys, HCL, HTC, Lenovo, Vertiv Co and INRIX. Above 70% of the students got an internship in Concentrix and HCL. Top roles offered to the students are analyst, developer, coder, developer in java, developer of C and testing profile.
content.Infrastructure: Labs of the mechanical department are moderate and very good. Facilities are impressive like digital classrooms, an auditorium with a capacity of 1,000 students and free Wi-Fi campus. There are many satisfactory washing machines for washing dress, and there is a great, clean and natural environment.

admission_process.title: RKDF Institute of Science and Technology (RKDFIST) Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: RKDF Institute of Science and Technology (RKDFIST) admission2025 is both merit and entrance-based. The college offers 24 programmes at the UG, PG and After 10th levels in various fields, including Engineering, Business and Management Studies and IT and Software, etc. The mode of study for the offered courses is full time. The institute accepts exams, such as GATE, CBSE 10th, and CBSE 12th, for admission to some specificRKDF Institute of Science and Technology (RKDFIST) courses. For certain programmes, the college considers the merit of the last qualifying exam of candidates, ensuring a comprehensive approach to admissions. Read more details around RKDF Institute of Science and Technology (RKDFIST) admission in the following article.
RKDF Institute of Science and Technology (RKDFIST)Duration: The college offers UG courses for 3 years - 4 years. For courses at PG level, the duration is 2 years - 3 years.

faqs.answer: A:    Vilasrao Deshmukh College of Engineering and Technology has courses such as B.Pharma, B.Tech, MBA/PGDM which are primarily in the stream of Medicine & Health Sciences, Engineering, Business & Management Studies. Vilasrao Deshmukh College of Engineering and Technology has specializations such as B.Tech specializations in Civil Engineering, Computer Science Engineering, Mechanical Engineering, Artificial Intelligence & Machine Learning.
faqs.question: Which courses are offered by Vilasrao Deshmukh College of Engineering and Technology?

faqs.answer:
A:    Vilasrao Deshmukh College of Engineering and Technology has below criteria for taking admissions to it's various courses: CoursesEligibilityB.PharmaCandidate must have studied Physics and Chemistry as compulsory subjects along with one of the Mathematics/Biology subjects with above mentioned marks in the above subjects taken together from any recognised Board/Council.
The mentioned marks of SC/ST and OBC is for the candidate belonging to maharashtra State.

Considering the last round 2024 cutoff, B.Tech. in Computer Engineering was the most sought-after BE/BTech specialization with a closing rank of 258804 for the general AI quota. The closing cutoff for the same stood at 451612 in 2023.

Vilasrao Deshmukh College of Engineering and Technology accepts JEE Main scores, followed by JoSAA and CSAB counselling rounds for admission to BTech and Integrated BTech courses. For JEE Main, a total of five counselling rounds were conducted. Additionally, two CSAB counselling rounds were also conducted to fill the vacant seats. MHT CET is the entrance exam for candidates seeking admission to the BE/BTech and other courses. The cutoff was released across different categories under the All India quota. Considering the last round cutoff data of 2025, Computer Science turned out to be the most competitive for admission, with a cutoff closing at 3.94. For the same competitive branch/course, the last round cutoff was 14.19 in the General category under the HS quota.

highlights.summary: Watch out this space for the latest news around College of Agricultural Engineering and Technology Courses, Fees, Eligibility, Admission, Rankings and Reviews.

fees_and_eligibility.overview: College of Agricultural Engineering and Technology is an institute which offers various courses at UG and PG levels. Students can choose Full Time programmes from streams such as Engineering and Science. At the UG level, students can choose the available programmes such as B.E. / B.Tech. Talking about PG level, some of the available courses include M.E./M.Tech and PG Diploma. The fee structure for the College of Agricultural Engineering and Technology programmes is around INR 5,000 to 16,000.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Agricultural Engineering - Batch of 2027
reviews_list.review_title: Review of Dr. Rajendra Prasad Central Agricultural University.

review_content.Placements: I am currently pursuing a B.Tech in Agricultural Engineering. It contains around 37 students, but the capacity is 44. Talking about placements, students often go for higher studies through GATE or CAT, but, there are placements. Companies like TAFE, Mahindra, Dehat, etc., come to our campus, offering an average package of around 3.5-4 LPA. The highest package is around 12 LPA.
review_content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure is the best, according to Agricultural University. There is a library called the University Library, which contains around 4 lakh books. The Wi-Fi speed is excellent. There are gardens like Saraswati Garden, Biodiversity Park, Titli Park, T3 Park, and River Front. There is also a sports complex offering different sports like badminton, table tennis, volleyball, cricket, etc. The hostel is the best, and every basic facility is available there. individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Agricultural Engineering - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: CAET, Pusa is one of the oldest colleges for agricultural education. Best place for students.

content.Placements: Hello everyone, in our college that is the College of Agricultural Engineering and Technology, approximately 60-70 percent of students get placed who are interested in placement, and some also go for higher studies. About placements, the average packages I cannot have enough information on, but average packages are approximately 7-8 LPA, and top recruiting companies are TAFE, JEEVIKA, and many more dairy companies. Almost every eligible student will get an internship in companies like TAFE, JEEVIKA, and many more. Sorry about that, but I cannot have enough information about that.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Agricultural Engineering - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: The college is best for studies, and teachers are well-educated.

content.Placements: About 40% of students get placed through college placements. The highest package offered is around 8 LPA, while the lowest is 4 LPA. The top recruiting companies are TAFE Tractors and Pradhan. Around 40% of the placed students secure jobs at Pradhan, while approximately 60% get placed at TAFE Tractors.
content.Infrastructure: The college has smart classrooms, a lecture theatre, virtual classrooms, computer labs, and a workshop for tractor and engineering work. All these facilities are available on campus. In the hostel, the food quality is average, and medical facilities are also provided. The hostel has Wi-Fi along with many other facilities are available.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Agricultural Engineering - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Review of Dr. Rajendra Prasad Central Agricultural University.

content.Placements: I am currently pursuing a B.Tech in Agricultural Engineering. It contains around 37 students, but the capacity is 44. Talking about placements, students often go for higher studies through GATE or CAT, but, there are placements. Companies like TAFE, Mahindra, Dehat, etc., come to our campus, offering an average package of around 3.5-4 LPA. The highest package is around 12 LPA.
content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure is the best, according to Agricultural University. There is a library called the University Library, which contains around 4 lakh books. The Wi-Fi speed is excellent. There are gardens like Saraswati Garden, Biodiversity Park, Titli Park, T3 Park, and River Front. There is also a sports complex offering different sports like badminton, table tennis, volleyball, cricket, etc. The hostel is the best, and every basic facility is available there. There is also a university hospital for any medical emergency.

individual_reviews.title: Life as an agricultural engineering student .

content.Infrastructure: The classrooms are well-equipped with smart boards, and a lecture theater is also present. The hostel is equipped with Wi-Fi 24 hours a day, and the mess is completely controlled and managed by the students. There are TT rooms, badminton courts, and volleyball courts available inside the hostel.

individual_reviews.course: Discontinued (June 2025) B.Tech. in Food Technology - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Review of College of Agricultural Engineering and Technology.

content.Placements: In our college total of 44 seats are available but 37 students take their admission. The highest salary offered is Rs. 1,200,000 in Pradhan and the lowest salary offered is Rs. 3,50,000. Top recruiting companies are Pradhan, TAFE, etc, many more. No internship is provided by our college. Courses offered by the college are B. Teach agricultural engineering, B.Teach food technology, B.Teach biotechnology, college of communities science, college of fisheries, horticulture, etc.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is good. The college has a library with Wi-Fi. A smart card to issue books. Classrooms are smart. They have projectors and Wi-Fi. In the hostel, good food is provided and Wi-Fi is present in hostel for students. The sports ground is not good and does not have enough availability of sports instruments.
